validation_results.name: Lint
validation_results.command: npx eslint src/app/agent-approvals/agents/page.tsx src/components/ai-monitoring/ActiveAgentsDashboard.tsx src/lib/active-agents/hooks.ts src/lib/active-agents/agent-utils.ts src/lib/active-agents/types.ts

kpi_results.actual: Status badges with live polling every 30s
Current task displayed per agent card
Health stat card shows healthy/issues count from API

definition_of_done_items.evidence: page.tsx exists with useRequireAuth guard and Suspense boundary

definition_of_done_items.criterion: Active agent list with health status
definition_of_done_items.evidence: AgentCard renders status badge with dot indicator per agent
AgentCard shows agent.currentTask with fallback 'No active task'

definition_of_done_items.criterion: Agent type breakdown (qualification, email, followup, NBA)

definition_of_done_items.evidence: StatCard for Health shows healthy/issues from aiMonitoring.getStatus
SearchFilterBar with status dropdown, type chips, search text, sort by lastActive/type/status
43/43 tests: rendering(9), data display(9), interactions(10), edge cases(5), accessibility(3), utility functions(7)

invariants_acknowledged: PG-151 implements Active Agents Dashboard at /agent-approvals/agents route
Uses tRPC endpoints aiMonitoring.getActiveAgents and aiMonitoring.getStatus with 30s polling
Follows hexagonal architecture: UI layer consumes API layer via tRPC hooks
Uses shared components PageHeader, SearchFilterBar, useMultiFilterState
Agent types: qualification, email, followup, nba with status indicators active/idle/error
Health status derived from aiMonitoring.getStatus endpoint
Filtering supports type chips, status dropdown, search text, sort options

notes: Active Agents Dashboard implemented with TDD. 6 files created: page shell with auth guard, main dashboard component (StatCard + AgentCard sub-components), comprehensive test suite (43 tests), tRPC polling hooks, utility functions, and TypeScript types. Fixed agentId nullability (string|null), removed unused Badge import (Foundation STOA finding). Coverage: 98.75% statements, 88.7% branches, 100% functions/lines (scoped to dashboard + utils, excluding mocked hooks.ts and type-only types.ts).
